case_title: KEVIN P NOBLE VS. MICHAEL BASHAW

docket_entries.description: AMENDED APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NOBLE, KEVIN P AS TO DEFENDANT BASHAW, MICHAEL
APPLICATION FOR SISTER STATE JUDGMENT IS "REJECTED". ALL DOCUMENTS WITH REJECT LETTER PLACED IN THE PICK-UP BOX.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT BASHAW, MICHAEL
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT BASHAW, MICHAEL
APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF NOBLE, KEVIN P AS TO DEFENDANT BASHAW, MICHAEL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

ORIGINAL NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT AND PROOF OF SERVICE ON APPLICATION AND NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NOBLE, KEVIN P SERVED OCT-30-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BASHAW, MICHAEL PROCESS COMPLETED BY DEFAULT SECTION. WRIT MAY ISSUE ON DEC-10-2013 IF NO MOTION FILED BY DEFENDANT

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NOBLE, KEVIN P RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BASHAW, MICHAEL $57,418.50 PRINCIPAL, $24,325.34 INTEREST, $450.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $82,193.84, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
